user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select an event for an announcement, so that I can target the announcement to the right context
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Announcements screen; When I choose a value from the Event dropdown; Then the announcement is associated with that event

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to submit a new announcement, so that it is published to employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected an event on the Announcements screen; When I click Submit; Then the announcement is saved and made available

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel the announcement form, so that I can discard my changes without publishing
acceptance_criteria: Given I have entered announcement details; When I click Cancel; Then the form is cleared and nothing is published

user_story: As an employee, I want to see a clear message when no announcements exist, so that I know there is nothing new to read
acceptance_criteria: Given there are no announcements; When I open the Announcements screen; Then I see a "No announcements available" message
